about.heading: A Community-Led Development Organization
about.description: Founded in 2075 B.S. (2019) by experienced community development professionals, CSDS Nepal operates from Dhangadhi, Kailali. We champion rights, dignity, and opportunity for the most marginalized communities in Sudurpachim Province.

programs.title: Human Rights & Advocacy
programs.desc: We educate communities on their rights, advocate for victims, and promote equality and inclusion across Sudurpachim Province.

programs.title: Peace Building
programs.desc: Leveraging expertise in post-conflict situations, we facilitate reconciliation and promote sustained peace at the grassroots level.

programs.title: Anti-Trafficking & Modern Slavery
programs.desc: Running awareness campaigns against human trafficking and labor exploitation, empowering vulnerable women and youth.

programs.title: Community Mobilization
programs.desc: Building trust through participatory approaches, stakeholder mapping, volunteer coordination and grassroots capacity development.

programs.title: Education & Livelihood
programs.desc: Strengthening access to formal education, TEVT skills training, and entrepreneurship support to improve youth employability.

programs.title: Networking & Partnership
programs.desc: Coordinating with GOs, NGOs, and INGOs to create strong networks that amplify impact across the community.

vmg.title: Vision
vmg.desc: Sustained peace and a developed society through empowerment of people living in difficult circumstances.

vmg.title: Mission
vmg.desc: Ensuring rights of marginalized women and children through advocacy, capacity building, and leadership development.

vmg.title: Goal
vmg.desc: Strengthen systems to enable access to formal education, TEVT skills, and combat all forms of discrimination.

strategies.title: Human Rights
strategies.desc: Support and sustain human rights through education, advocacy, and direct support for victims.

strategies.title: Advocacy
strategies.desc: Make communities aware of rights-based approaches through training and targeted campaigns.

strategies.title: Peace Building
strategies.desc: Publicize expertise in peace-building in post-conflict environments.

strategies.title: Networking
strategies.desc: Coordinate with district agencies and CBOs for strong unified social impact.

strategies.title: Partnership
strategies.desc: Collaborate with GOs, NGOs, and INGOs to scale programs at field level.

strategies.title: Capacity Building
strategies.desc: Provide trainings in leadership, PRA, conflict management, and more.

strategies.title: Research
strategies.desc: Study and investigate needs and potential programs for sustainability.

hero.description: CSDS Nepal is a nonprofit development organization rooted in Kailali, dedicated to human rights advocacy, anti-trafficking, peace building, and community upliftment since 2019.
